textByHash.827d7c5838352bfa57e240924c2f1edaf6e5b56c: Welcome, one and all, to the Fortis Colosseum! We have a thrilling event lined up for you today, but first, we have something new to show you!
textByHash.a55c9c4baac2b49b566c2504f0efd7541c11da72: Introducing the kebab! This delicacy comes straight from the east and is just the thing to give you the strength you need after a hard day of work.
textByHash.8b8ef7c5dc6dcea18ba10a3762ede808f15efb55: Indeed, observe the strength provided by a single bite of one!
